statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next safe Owner Workflow slice.

Changed:
- Added `Save` to each `maintenance.html#service-prep` card.
- Service Prep saves checked items to local Garage Notes, or the full card if nothing is checked.
- Preserves unrelated `ridgeline-notes` keys and prepends to existing `general_notes`.
- Added search keywords for prep-note queries.
- Bumped service worker cache to `ridgeline-console-v276`.
- Expanded browser smoke coverage for Service Prep save behavior and mobile density.
- Updated `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `ANTON_ROADMAP.md`, `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`, and `ANTON.md`.

Verified:
- `Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1 -Pages @('maintenance.html')` passed.
- `Invoke-SiteAudit.ps1 -Tag audit-v276-service-prep-save-final -SkipScreenshots` passed.
- `Capture-Screenshots.ps1` still hit the known first-shot failure, so I used direct Playwright fallback screenshots:
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v276-service-prep-save-mobile-maintenance.png`
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v276-service-prep-save-desktop-maintenance.png`

Next safe slice: review the Service Prep and Minder saved Garage Notes output on the real iPhone/Garage Notes path before adding larger job templates, parts/inventory handoffs, or sync conflict behavior.
